input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.6.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

EV.7.6.2 The IMD must be a Bender ISOMETER® IR155-3203 or IR155-3204 (website) or an approved 
alternate equivalent IMD

final_answer: The IMD must be a Bender ISOMETER® IR155-3203 or IR155-3204 (website) or an approved alternate equivalent IMD Refer to the Rules FAQ on the FSAE Online website for approved equivalent IMD
